sections.heading: Starting a business
items: Business planning, naming a business, registering with the government, getting support and financing

sections.heading: Business taxes
items: Income tax, GST/HST, payroll and T4 information returns, business numbers, customs duties and tariffs

sections.heading: Business financing and support
items: Grants and contributions, loans, tax credits, wage subsidies and other business support

sections.heading: Federal corporations
items: Incorporating or making changes to a business corporation, not-for-profit, cooperative or board of trade

sections.heading: Maintaining your business
items: Managing your business operations, strategic and financial planning, marketing, social responsibility

sections.heading: Permits, licences and regulations
items: Search permits and licences, find regulations for your industry and business activities

sections.heading: Hiring and managing employees
items: Payroll, wages and other resources for recruiting, training and managing employees

sections.heading: International trade and investment
items: Exporting, importing and investing in Canada and foreign markets

sections.heading: Intellectual property and copyright
items: Trademarks, patents, copyright, industrial designs and protecting your intellectual property

sections.heading: Research and business intelligence
items: Industry sector data, financial benchmarks, labour trends and business statistics

sections.heading: Doing business with the government
items: Selling to the federal government, buying from the government, selling to other governments

sections.heading: R&D and innovation
items: Funding, collaboration, commercialization and licensing resources to help fuel innovation

sections.heading: Protecting your business
items: Emergency planning, risk management, insurance, legal issues, security and privacy, fraud

sections.heading: Insolvency for business
items: Options for dealing with debt, making a proposal to creditors, filing for bankruptcy

sections.heading: Help for those affected by tariffs
items: Learn more about financial supports and more.

sections.heading: Supports for business
items: Solutions to your business challenges rights at your fingertip.

sections.heading: Canada’s government surplus marketplace
items: Shop GCSurplus for affordable government surplus items (furniture, vehicles and more) and support sustainability nationwide.

sections.heading: Beware of suspicious messages, report them!
items: Learn how to recognize suspicious text messages and report them safely to help protect yourself.
